word: H2578 - חֲמַת צֹובָה - Chămath Tsôwbâh - kham-ath' tso-baw' - Hamath-Zobah

sections.paragraph:
Original: חמת צובה

Transliteration: chămath tsôbâh

Phonetic: kham-ath' tso-baw'

BDB Definition:

Hamath-Zobah = "fortress of Zobah"
  1. a town site unknown; maybe same as 'Hammath'

Origin: from H2574 and H6678

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
